fields.text: The table arrived earlier than expected. Great quality!

fields.name: Max
fields.text: Bed is comfortable but assembly instructions were confusing.

fields.name: Elena
fields.text: Very poor customer service. The sofa had a defect.

fields.name: Ivan
fields.text: Excellent value for money. Will order again.

fields.name: Olga
fields.text: Delivery was late, but the product is nice.

fields.name: Sergey

fields.name: Daria

fields.name: Pavel
fields.text: Good quality, but a bit overpriced.

fields.name: Natalia
fields.text: Very happy with my purchase. Smooth transaction.

fields.name: Furniture Factory
fields.description: Furniture Factory has been a leading manufacturer of high-quality furniture for over a decade.
fields.mission: To create beautiful, functional, and sustainable furniture that enhances living and working spaces.

values.title: Quality
values.description: We use only the finest materials and craftsmanship.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: We constantly improve our designs and production methods.

values.title: Sustainability
values.description: We are committed to environmentally responsible practices.

fields.working_hours:
Monday - Friday: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM
Saturday: 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM
Sunday: Closed
fields.products_info: We manufacture a wide range of furniture including kitchen, office, and cabinet furniture. Each piece is designed with attention to detail and built to last.

fields.question: What is the estimated delivery time?
fields.answer: Delivery usually takes 5–7 business days after order confirmation.

fields.question: Do you offer assembly service?
fields.answer: Yes, you can add assembly for $30 per item during checkout.

fields.question: What is your return policy?
fields.answer: You may return unused items within 14 days for a full refund.

fields.question: Can I change my delivery address after ordering?
fields.answer: Please contact support within 2 hours of placing the order.

fields.question: Do you ship internationally?
fields.answer: Currently we only ship within Belarus.

fields.question: How can I track my order?
fields.answer: A tracking link will be sent to your email once the order is dispatched.

fields.question: Are your products eco-friendly?
fields.answer: We use FSC-certified wood and water-based finishes.
